$comment: NEGATIVE-VALIDATION FIXTURE (P1 W6-T4) — NOT a real audit of this repo.
A synthetic `npm audit --json` (npm v7+ schema) carrying ONE high-severity
advisory whose GHSA id is deliberately NOT in frontend/.npm-audit-allowlist.json.
Piping this into scripts/npm-audit-gate.mjs MUST exit 1 (the gate BITES on a
known-vulnerable dep). GHSA-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx is a placeholder id chosen to never
match a real or allowlisted advisory. See docs/security/supply-chain-scanning.md
'Local validation'. This fixture is evidence-only; CI does not consume it.
